title: Strict DER Signature Encoding
description: The consensus rule that requires legacy ECDSA signatures in Bitcoin script to use strict Distinguished Encoding Rules (DER), rejecting ambiguous encodings that could otherwise create multiple valid transaction representations.

resources.title: BIP 66: Strict DER Signatures
resources.notes: Canonical specification for the deployed strict-DER consensus rule and its validation behavior.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core BIP Implementation Index
resources.notes: Shows how BIP 66 is implemented and deployed in Bitcoin Core.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Script Interpreter
resources.notes: Implementation reference for signature-encoding checks during script evaluation.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Provides the signature, script, and transaction context needed to understand strict encoding rules.
